title: How to integrate AI-powered chat features while ensuring privacy?

posts.author: jameswood32 (James Wood )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m exploring the development of a modern messaging app, and I want it to be secure, scalable, and user-friendly. I’d love to hear your insights and experiences with:

  • Security: Best ways to implement end-to-end encryption and protect user data.

  • Scalability: Handling millions of users without downtime.

  • User Experience: Features that improve engagement and usability.

  • Technology Stack: Recommended frameworks, databases, and messaging protocols.

If you’ve built or contributed to a messaging app, what strategies or lessons helped your project succeed? Any pitfalls to avoid?

Thanks in advance!
